abilities.name: Chatty
abilities.text: Enemy models within 6" must each discard a card to declare the Interact action.

abilities.name: Flight
abilities.text: This model ignores terrain and other models while moving.

abilities.name: Showboating
abilities.text: When this model ends its activation, if it cheated fate from its control hand during its activation, it may draw a card.

actions.name: Monologue
actions.effects: Move the target up to 3" and it gains an Entranced token.

triggers.name: Draw Out Secrets
triggers.text: Make a Scheme marker in base contact with the target.

actions.name: Zipp Zapper
actions.effects: Enemy models within (aura)1" of the target are dealt 1 damage. Then, move models damaged by this action up to 2".

triggers.name: Burst Damage
triggers.text: When resolving, increase the (aura) of this action by 1".

triggers.name: Convulsions
triggers.text: Move the target up to 3". Then the target must either discard a card or this model may move it up to 3".

actions.name: Full Speed Ahead
actions.effects: Move the target 5", ignoring models and terrain. Then, the target gains a Hastened token.

triggers.name: Choice Insult
triggers.text: An enemy within 6" of the target moves 6" directly toward the target.

triggers.name: Caught in the Rigging
triggers.text: Choose a marker within 2" of the target. Make a friendly copy of the chosen marker in base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Grand Display
triggers.text: Make a Piano marker within 2" of the target.
